title: Foundation Calculator
shortDescription: Estimate concrete volume, rebar, and waterproofing needed for your foundation.
metaTitle: Foundation Calculator | Concrete Volume, Bags and Side Area
metaDescription: Calculate foundation concrete volume, required bags, and side area for waterproofing or insulation. Fast, simple foundation calculator.
intro: Use this foundation calculator to estimate concrete volume, the number of bags, and the side area to waterproof or insulate. Enter the foundation length, width, height, waste margin, and bag yield to get quick results.
overview: This tool helps you plan a foundation pour by converting basic dimensions into practical material estimates. It calculates concrete volume in cubic meters, estimates how many bags are needed based on bag yield, and shows the side area for waterproofing or insulation.
howItWorks: Enter the foundation length in meters and width in meters.
Provide the foundation height in centimeters.
Add the waste percentage to include a safety margin.
Enter the concrete bag yield in cubic meters per bag.
Review the calculated concrete volume, bag count, and side area.
useCases: Estimating concrete for strip foundations and footings.
Checking how many bags of concrete mix to buy.
Calculating the area for foundation waterproofing.
Planning insulation materials for foundation sides.
Creating a quick material estimate before ordering supplies.

examples.title: Example
examples.input: Length 10 m, width 0.5 m, height 80 cm, waste 10%, bag yield 0.02 m3
examples.output: Concrete volume, bag count, and side area are calculated automatically.
examples.description: A typical planning scenario for a foundation strip.

examples.title: Example
examples.input: Length 12 m, width 0.4 m, height 60 cm, waste 5%, bag yield 0.025 m3
examples.output: The tool estimates total concrete and required bags with reserve.
examples.description: Useful for comparing material options before purchase.

faq.question: What does the foundation calculator calculate?
faq.answer: It calculates concrete volume, the number of bags needed, and the side area for waterproofing or insulation.

faq.question: How do I enter the height?
faq.answer: Enter the foundation height in centimeters. The calculator converts it to meters internally.

faq.question: Does the result include waste?
faq.answer: Yes. The waste percentage is added to the calculated concrete volume before estimating bags.

faq.question: Can I use it for foundation strips?
faq.answer: Yes. It works well for strip foundations, footings, and similar linear foundation elements.

seo.title: Foundation Calculator
seo.description: Calculate concrete volume, required bags, and side area for waterproofing or insulation with this foundation calculator.
